---
title: "About Me"
---

```{=html}

<!-- ====== ABOUT INTRO ====== -->
<section class="page-section reveal">
<div class="container">

<div class="row g-5 align-items-start">

<!-- Left: Visual -->
<div class="col-lg-4 text-center">
<div style="background: var(--om-gradient-hero); border-radius: var(--om-radius-lg); padding: 2.5rem; position: relative;">
<div style="background: white; border-radius: var(--om-radius); padding: 2rem;">
<i class="fas fa-user-graduate" style="font-size: 5rem; color: var(--om-primary);"></i>
</div>
</div>

<div class="mt-4">
<h4 style="font-family: var(--om-font-heading); font-size: 1.1rem; color: #8B7355; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Quick Facts</h4>
<div style="text-align: left;">
<div style="padding: .5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,149,93,.1);">
<strong>Location:</strong> Lenasia South, Gauteng
</div>
<div style="padding: .5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,149,93,.1);">
<strong>Degree:</strong> MSc Mathematical Statistics
</div>
<div style="padding: .5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,149,93,.1);">
<strong>University:</strong> University of the Witwatersrand
</div>
<div style="padding: .5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,149,93,.1);">
<strong>Exams Passed:</strong> 7 Actuarial Exams
</div>
<div style="padding: .5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,149,93,.1);">
<strong>Award:</strong> 1st Prize SASA Conference 2025
</div>
<div style="padding: .5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,149,93,.1);">
<strong>Teaching:</strong> Maths Stats Tutor at Wits
</div>
<div style="padding: .5rem 0;">
<strong>NSC:</strong> Maths 99%, Physical Sciences 100%
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Right: Bio -->
<div class="col-lg-8">
<h1 style="font-family: var(--om-font-heading); font-size: 2.5rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: .5rem;">
About <span class="gradient-text">Odey</span>
</h1>
<p style="font-size: 1.15rem; color: var(--om-primary); font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
Actuarial Science & Mathematical Statistics Graduate
</p>

<p style="font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.8; color: #5C3D2E;">
I am an aspiring actuary and statistical researcher currently pursuing an MSc in Mathematical Statistics
at the University of the Witwatersrand. My dissertation explores a <strong>Multidimensional Climate Risk
Scorecard using a Bayesian Spatial Copula Framework for Insurance Pricing and Sustainability Strategy
in KwaZulu-Natal</strong> — combining my passions for spatial statistics, Bayesian methods, and actuarial
risk modelling into research with real-world climate and insurance applications.
</p>

<p style="font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.8; color: #5C3D2E;">
With a BSc in Actuarial Science (where I passed 7 professional actuarial examinations under the
Institute and Faculty of Actuaries / Actuarial Society of South Africa framework) and a BSc Honours
in Mathematical Statistics completed with Distinction (final mark of 84% on my research project),
I bring a unique combination of rigorous quantitative training and applied analytical skill. My
technical expertise centres on the R programming environment — including tidyverse, ggplot2, caret,
and spatial packages like gstat and sp — supplemented by strong SQL, advanced Excel, and Power BI
capabilities.
</p>

<p style="font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.8; color: #5C3D2E;">
Beyond coursework, I have demonstrated the ability to work under pressure in competitive settings
(ASA DataFest 2025 participant, selected as Facilitator for DataFest 2026), deliver top-performing
survey designs (Applied Sampling), and communicate complex statistical concepts to both academic and
industry audiences. I currently serve as a Mathematical Statistics Tutor at Wits, teaching first- to
third-year students in probability, statistical inference, and regression — strengthening both my own
understanding and my ability to make complex ideas accessible. I am a SAADP (South African
Actuarial Development Programme), Siyandisa Achievers, and ProMaths Programme alumnus, and I
scored 99% in Mathematics and 100% in Physical Sciences at NSC level.
</p>
</div>

</div>

</div>
</section>

<!-- ====== SKILLS ====== -->
<section class="page-section reveal" style="background: var(--om-gradient-subtle);">
<div class="container">

<div class="section-header">
<h2>Technical Expertise</h2>
<p>A comprehensive toolkit spanning programming, statistical methodology, and actuarial science — refined through academic rigour and applied research.</p>
</div>

<div class="row g-4">

<!-- Programming -->
<div class="col-lg-4">
<div class="skill-category">
<h3><i class="fas fa-code" style="color: var(--om-primary);"></i> Programming & Tools</h3>
<div class="progress-bar-container">
<div class="progress-label"><span>R (tidyverse, ggplot2, caret)</span><span>95%</span></div>
<div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" style="width: 95%;"></div></div>
</div>
<div class="progress-bar-container">
<div class="progress-label"><span>SQL</span><span>85%</span></div>
<div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" style="width: 85%;"></div></div>
</div>
<div class="progress-bar-container">
<div class="progress-label"><span>Excel (Advanced)</span><span>90%</span></div>
<div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" style="width: 90%;"></div></div>
</div>
<div class="progress-bar-container">
<div class="progress-label"><span>Power BI</span><span>80%</span></div>
<div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" style="width: 80%;"></div></div>
</div>
<div class="progress-bar-container">
<div class="progress-label"><span>LaTeX / Quarto</span><span>75%</span></div>
<div class="progress-track"><div class="progress-fill" style="width: 75%;"></div></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Statistical Methods -->
<div class="col-lg-4">
<div class="skill-category">
<h3><i class="fas fa-brain" style="color: var(--om-secondary);"></i> Statistical Methods</h3>
<ul class="method-list">
<li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Regression Analysis (Linear, Logistic, Regularised)</li>
<li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Spatial Statistics & Geostatistics</li>
<li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Predictive Modelling & Machine Learning</li>
<li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Time Series Analysis & Forecasting</li>
<li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Survival & Reliability Analysis</li>
<li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Survey Sampling & Estimation</li>
<li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Bayesian Statistics</li>
<li><i class="fas fa-check-circle"></i> Biostatistics & Clinical Data</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<!-- Actuarial -->
<div class="col-lg-4">
<div class="skill-category">
<h3><i class="fas fa-briefcase" style="color: #7c3aed;"></i> Actuarial Exams</h3>
<p style="font-size: .85rem; color: #8B7355; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
Professional examinations under the Institute and Faculty of Actuaries (IFOA) and Actuarial Society of South Africa (ASSA) framework.
</p>
<div class="exam-grid">
<div class="exam-cell passed">A111</div>
<div class="exam-cell passed">A112</div>
<div class="exam-cell passed">A211</div>
<div class="exam-cell passed">A212</div>
<div class="exam-cell passed">A213</div>
<div class="exam-cell passed">A113</div>
<div class="exam-cell passed">N111</div>
<div class="exam-summary">7 Passed</div>
</div>
<p style="font-size: .75rem; color: #8B7355; margin-top: .75rem; margin-bottom: 0;">IFOA/ASSA Professional Examinations</p>
</div>
</div>

</div>

</div>
</section>

<!-- ====== EDUCATION ====== -->
<section class="page-section reveal">
<div class="container">

<div class="section-header">
<h2>Education</h2>
<p>A progressive academic journey through actuarial science and mathematical statistics at the University of the Witwatersrand.</p>
</div>

<div style="max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto;">

<div class="timeline">

<!-- MSc -->
<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-dot" style="background: var(--om-primary);">
<i class="fas fa-graduation-cap"></i>
</div>
<div class="d-flex flex-column flex-sm-row justify-content-between align-items-start mb-2">
<h3>MSc in Mathematical Statistics</h3>
<span class="year-badge" style="background: rgba(184,92,56,.1); color: var(--om-primary);">In Progress — 2026</span>
</div>
<div class="institution">University of the Witwatersrand</div>
<p style="color: #7A6C5E; font-size: .95rem; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0;">
Dissertation: <em>Multidimensional Climate Risk Scorecard: A Bayesian Spatial Copula Framework
for Insurance Pricing and Sustainability Strategy in KwaZulu-Natal.</em> This research integrates
Bayesian spatial modelling with copula dependence structures to develop a climate risk scorecard
for insurance pricing, bridging spatial statistics and actuarial science in the context of climate
change adaptation. Recipient of the Postgraduate Masters Merit Award (2026).
</p>
</div>

<!-- Honours -->
<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-dot" style="background: var(--om-secondary);">
<i class="fas fa-award"></i>
</div>
<div class="d-flex flex-column flex-sm-row justify-content-between align-items-start mb-2">
<h3>BSc Honours in Mathematical Statistics</h3>
<span class="year-badge" style="background: rgba(201,149,93,.1); color: #8B6D3F;">2025 — Distinction</span>
</div>
<div class="institution">University of the Witwatersrand</div>
<p style="color: #7A6C5E; font-size: .95rem; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0;">
Graduated with Distinction. Research project scored 84% — the top project in Mathematical
Statistics Honours. Coursework spanned Spatial Statistics, Statistical Machine Learning, Operations
Research, Biostatistics, Survival Analysis, and Applied Sampling. Awarded the Liberty Sandton City
Voucher for Best Honours Mathematical Statistics Student and the Peter Fridjhon Gold Medal for Best
Honours Research Project.
</p>
</div>

<!-- BSc -->
<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-dot" style="background: #7c3aed;">
<i class="fas fa-calculator"></i>
</div>
<div class="d-flex flex-column flex-sm-row justify-content-between align-items-start mb-2">
<h3>BSc in Actuarial Science</h3>
<span class="year-badge" style="background: rgba(124,58,237,.1); color: #7c3aed;">2022 — 2024</span>
</div>
<div class="institution">University of the Witwatersrand</div>
<p style="color: #7A6C5E; font-size: .95rem; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0;">
Comprehensive training in Actuarial Reserving, Survival Analysis, Time Series, Actuarial Economics,
and Financial Mathematics. Successfully passed 7 professional actuarial examinations under the IFOA/ASSA
framework during undergraduate studies, demonstrating exceptional discipline and quantitative aptitude.
</p>
</div>

<!-- NSC -->
<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-dot" style="background: #5C9A4F;">
<i class="fas fa-school"></i>
</div>
<div class="d-flex flex-column flex-sm-row justify-content-between align-items-start mb-2">
<h3>National Senior Certificate</h3>
<span class="year-badge" style="background: rgba(92,154,79,.1); color: #3D6B30;">2021</span>
</div>
<div class="institution">Free State, South Africa</div>
<p style="color: #7A6C5E; font-size: .95rem; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0;">
Top 100 Achiever in the Free State Province. Scored 99% in Mathematics and 100% in Physical
Sciences at NSC level — demonstrating early exceptional aptitude in quantitative subjects.
</p>
</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>
</section>

<!-- ====== TEACHING ====== -->
<section class="page-section reveal" style="background: var(--om-gradient-subtle);">
<div class="container">

<div class="section-header">
<h2>Teaching Experience</h2>
<p>Sharing knowledge and strengthening understanding through academic tutoring.</p>
</div>

<div style="max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto;">

<div class="timeline">

<div class="timeline-item">
<div class="timeline-dot" style="background: var(--om-primary);">
<i class="fas fa-chalkboard-teacher"></i>
</div>
<h3>Mathematical Statistics Tutor</h3>
<div class="institution">University of the Witwatersrand · 2025–2026</div>
<p style="color: #7A6C5E; font-size: .95rem; line-height: 1.7; margin: 0;">
Tutored first- to third-year students in probability, statistical inference, and regression concepts.
Supported students in developing problem-solving and analytical reasoning skills, while strengthening
my own communication abilities by explaining complex statistical ideas clearly and accessibly. This
experience reinforced my belief that teaching is one of the most effective ways to deepen mastery
of a subject.
</p>
</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>
</section>

<!-- ====== ACHIEVEMENTS ====== -->
<section class="page-section reveal">
<div class="container">

<div class="section-header">
<h2>Achievements & Recognition</h2>
<p>Milestones earned through academic excellence, competitive performance, and community impact.</p>
</div>

<div class="row g-4">

<div class="col-md-3 col-6">
<div class="achievement-card">
<i class="fas fa-trophy" style="color: var(--om-secondary);"></i>
<h4>1st Prize Poster</h4>
<p>SASA Conference 2025</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-3 col-6">
<div class="achievement-card">
<i class="fas fa-medal" style="color: var(--om-primary);"></i>
<h4>Peter Fridjhon Gold Medal</h4>
<p>Best Honours Research Project</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-3 col-6">
<div class="achievement-card">
<i class="fas fa-award" style="color: #7c3aed;"></i>
<h4>Liberty Award</h4>
<p>Best Honours Stats Student</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-3 col-6">
<div class="achievement-card">
<i class="fas fa-star" style="color: #D4A853;"></i>
<h4>Masters Merit Award</h4>
<p>Postgraduate Award 2026</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-3 col-6">
<div class="achievement-card">
<i class="fas fa-percentage" style="color: #5C9A4F;"></i>
<h4>100%</h4>
<p>Physical Sciences NSC</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-3 col-6">
<div class="achievement-card">
<i class="fas fa-calculator" style="color: var(--om-primary);"></i>
<h4>99%</h4>
<p>Mathematics NSC</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-3 col-6">
<div class="achievement-card">
<i class="fas fa-medal" style="color: #8B7355;"></i>
<h4>Top 100 Achiever</h4>
<p>Free State Province</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-3 col-6">
<div class="achievement-card">
<i class="fas fa-user-graduate" style="color: #7c3aed;"></i>
<h4>SAADP & Siyandisa</h4>
<p>Development Programme Alumni</p>
</div>
</div>

</div>

</div>
</section>

```
